behavior: Ground-foraging songbird that walks deliberately through leaf litter, often with its short tail held cocked upward.
field_marks: Dull orange crown stripe bordered by blackish stripes
White underparts with heavy dark streaking
Fairly thick pointed bill, pink legs, and short tail
habitat: Large, mature closed-canopy deciduous or mixed forests with deep leaf litter; also uses forest thickets outside the breeding season.

sources.title: Ovenbird Life History | All About Birds
